description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded shell with a predominantly white surface, accented by weathered orange markings and black trim. The front displays a prominent T-shaped black visor area, flanked by angular orange graphics and a central vertical orange stripe running from the top to the chin. The sides are equipped with raised, mechanical-looking details, including circular elements and ribbed structures, suggesting reinforced protection and possible communication or filtration components. The rear of the helmet is smooth with a central vertical groove and a continuation of the orange stripe, while the overall surface shows signs of wear, scratches, and scuff marks, indicating extensive use. The helmet's design is reminiscent of science fiction or tactical military gear, with a focus on both protection and visual intimidation. The interior is not visible, but the structure implies space for a human head and likely padding for comfort.
description: A white, weathered helmet with orange markings, a black T-shaped visor, and mechanical side details, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped black visor, central orange stripe, and angular orange graphics above the eyes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ribbed mechanical detail, circular side element, and partial orange markings near the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth surface with a central groove and the continuation of the orange stripe, lacking visor or side details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with ribbed and circular mechanical features and visible weathering.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small horizontal slits on each side near the lower jaw area, integrated into the ribbed mechanical details; no large or prominent vents visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered white base with a central orange stripe, angular orange motifs above the visor, and black visor area; no text or imagery.
